subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Spirit, sent down in truth from a penitent servant, that thou mayest hearken unto the melodies of the Cause and be among those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الروح نزلت بالحق من عبد منیب لتسمع نغمات الامر و تکون من الذینهم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
